ModMetaData.name: [RH] DOOM: UAC Kit
ModMetaData.author: Chicken Plucker
ModMetaData.description:
Adds UAC uniforms from DOOM, ranging from the classic space marine armor to current UAC power armors.
Credits: Dninemfive - UAC Shield beltcoding id Software - DOOM 2016 and DOOM Eternal Mick Gordon - DOOM Soundtrack Nicholas Dunbeck - DOOM backgrounds Luis Perez - Environmental art for DOOM Robert Hodri - Environmental art for DOOM Emerson Tung - Power armor art for DOOM Various artists - backgrounds for previews Otrixx - UAC logo
